findings.description: Job Purnell's wife, recorded living with him in the 1851 census of Trowbridge, was Serena (indexed as 'Serinah') — her maiden name was Deacon.
supporting_sources: "England and Wales, Census, 1851", FamilySearch, household of Job Purnell, Trowbridge, Wiltshire — wife Serinah Purnell.
"England, Wiltshire, Church Records" / GRO marriage index — Job Purnell married Serena Deacon, 1849 (supplies the maiden name Deacon).

findings.description: Job and Serena's child recorded in the 1851 census household was Samuel (Jesse) Purnell, an infant born about 1850.
supporting_sources: "England and Wales, Census, 1851", FamilySearch, household of Job Purnell, Trowbridge, Wiltshire — son Samuel Purnell, age ~1.

findings.description: The wife's maiden name was Deacon (not stated in the 1851 census itself; recoverable from the 1849 marriage record).
supporting_sources: Job Purnell–Serena Deacon marriage, 1849, Trowbridge / Melksham registration district.
